item.title: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) Announces Acquisition of Run:ai Labs for $700 Million
item.description: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) today announced the completion of its acquisition of Run:ai Labs, a leader in GPU orchestration, for $700 million.

item.title: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) Receives FDA Approval for New Oncology Drug
item.description: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced FDA approval of its new phase 3 oncology treatment.

item.title: Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) Cuts Full-Year Guidance
item.description: Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) today lowered its full-year 2026 EPS guidance from $2.00 to $1.70, citing supply chain disruptions.
